mapper.select: /* ====== cmn.authmgmt.prgmDetail =========*/ SELECT a.PRGM_ID , a.MENU_ID , a.PRGM_NM , a.PRGM_DESC , a.PRGM_URL , a.USG_YN , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , a.PRGM_TYPE , a.UPPR_PRGM_ID FROM CMN_PRGM_MST a WHERE a.PRGM_ID = #{PRGM_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.prgmInsertDupMainCheck =========*/
SELECT a.PRGM_ID , a.MENU_ID , a.PRGM_NM , a.PRGM_DESC , a.PRGM_URL , a.USG_YN , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , a.PRGM_TYPE , a.UPPR_PRGM_ID FROM CMN_PRGM_MST a WHERE a.MENU_ID = #{MENU_ID} AND A.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' AND #{PRGM_TYPE} = 'MAIN'

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.prgmUpdateDupMainCheck =========*/
SELECT a.PRGM_ID , a.MENU_ID , a.PRGM_NM , a.PRGM_DESC , a.PRGM_URL , a.USG_YN , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , a.PRGM_TYPE , a.UPPR_PRGM_ID FROM CMN_PRGM_MST a WHERE a.MENU_ID = #{MENU_ID} AND A.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' AND A.PRGM_ID != #{PRGM_ID} AND #{PRGM_TYPE} = 'MAIN'

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.menuList =========*/
SELECT a.MENU_ID , a.MENU_LVL , a.MENU_NM , a.MENU_DSC , a.HGHR_MENU_ID , a.ALGN_SEQ , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , a.DUTY_NM , a.DEL_YN , a.PRGM_ID , a.DUTY_ID FROM CMN_MENU_MST a WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.MENU_NM like '%' || #{searchMenuNm} || '%'
AND a.MENU_LVL = #{searchMenuLvl} '

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.menuDetail =========*/
SELECT a.MENU_ID , a.MENU_LVL , a.MENU_NM , a.MENU_DSC , a.HGHR_MENU_ID , a.ALGN_SEQ , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM , a.DUTY_NM , a.DEL_YN , a.PRGM_ID , a.DUTY_ID FROM CMN_MENU_MST a WHERE a.MENU_ID = #{MENU_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.authList =========*/
SELECT a.AUTH_ID , a.ORGN_ID , a.AUTH_NM , a.AUTH_DSC , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_AUTH_MST a WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.AUTH_NM like '%' || #{searchAuthNm} || '%'
AND (a.USG_YN IS NULL OR a.USG_YN = #{searchUsgYn} )
ORDER BY a.AUTH_ID

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.authList =========*/
SELECT a.AUTH_ID , a.ORGN_ID , a.AUTH_NM , a.AUTH_DSC , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_AUTH_MST a WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.AUTH_NM like '%' || #{searchAuthNm} || '%'
AND (a.USG_YN IS NULL OR a.USG_YN = #{searchUsgYn} )
ORDER BY a.AUTH_ID

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.authDetail =========*/
SELECT a.AUTH_ID , a.ORGN_ID , a.AUTH_NM , a.AUTH_DSC , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_AUTH_MST a WHERE a.AUTH_ID = #{AUTH_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.groupSearchList =========*/
SELECT a.GRP_ID , a.GRP_NM , a.GRP_DSC , a.USG_YN , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_GRP_MST a

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.authMenuDetail =========*/
SELECT a.AUTH_ID , a.MENU_ID , a.CREAT_ABABLE_YN , a.DEL_AUTH , a.RVISN_AUTH , a.SRCH_AUTH , a.EXEL_ABABLE_YN , a.PRNT_ABABLE_YN , a.REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(a.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(a.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST a WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.AUTH_ID = #{AUTH_ID} AND a.MENU_ID = #{MENU_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.usrMenuAsgnDetail =========*/
SELECT a.USR_ID , a.USR_ID AS USR_ID_MSK , a.MENU_ID , a.CREAT_ABABLE_YN , a.DEL_AUTH , a.RVISN_AUTH , a.SRCH_AUTH , a.EXEL_ABABLE_YN , a.PRNT_ABABLE_YN , a.REGST_ID , a.REGST_DTTM , a.RVISN_ID , a.RVISN_DTTM , b.USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST a, CMN_USR_MST B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND a.MENU_ID = #{MENU_ID} AND a.USR_ID = #{USR_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.usrGrpList =========*/
SELECT GRP_ID , GRP_NM , GRP_DSC , USG_YN , REGST_ID ,TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_GRP_MST WHERE 1=1
AND ( GRP_ID LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{GRP_ID} ) || '%' OR GRP_ID LIKE '%' || LOWER( #{GRP_ID} ) || '%' )
AND ( GRP_NM LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{GRP_NM} ) || '%' OR GRP_NM LIKE '%' || LOWER( #{GRP_NM} ) || '%' )
AND ( REGST_ID LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{REGST_ID} ) || '%' OR GRP_NM LIKE '%' || LOWER( #{REGST_ID} ) || '%' )
ORDER BY GRP_ID

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.usrGrpDetail =========*/
SELECT GRP_ID , GRP_NM , GRP_DSC , USG_YN , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_USR_GRP_MST WHERE GRP_ID = #{GRP_ID}

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.grpIdList =========*/
SELECT '' AS GRP_ID , '선택' AS GRP_NM FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT A.GRP_ID , A.GRP_NM FROM CMN_USR_GRP_MST A WHERE A.USG_YN = 'Y'

/* ====== cmn.authmgmt.usrAuthReportList =========*/
with CMN_MENU_MST_HGHR as ( SELECT ROWNUM ROW_INDEX , a.MENU_ID , a.MENU_LVL , a.MENU_NM , replace(RPAD(' ', 4*(LEVEL - 1)),' ','.') || MENU_NM MENU_NM_HGHR , a.MENU_DSC , a.HGHR_MENU_ID , a.ALGN_SEQ , a.USG_YN , a.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , a.DUTY_NM , a.DUTY_ID FROM CMN_MENU_MST a START WITH '0' = a.MENU_LVL CONNECT BY a.HGHR_MENU_ID = PRIOR a.MENU_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY 1 + ALGN_SEQ ) SELECT B.ROW_INDEX ,DECODE(LAG(B.MENU_ID) OVER(ORDER BY ROW_INDEX, B.MENU_ID), B.MENU_ID, '', B.MENU_ID) MENU_ID ,DECODE(LAG(B.MENU_NM_HGHR) OVER(ORDER BY ROW_INDEX, B.MENU_ID), B.MENU_NM_HGHR, '', B.MENU_NM_HGHR) MENU_NM_HGHR ,B.USG_YN MENU_USG_YN ,A.AUTH_TYPE ,A.GRP_ID ,C.GRP_NM ,C.USG_YN GRP_USG_YN ,A.AUTH_ID ,D.AUTH_NM ,D.USG_YN AUTH_USG_YN , DECODE(A.PRGM_TYPE, 'MAIN','메인', 'SRCH','검색','CREAT','등록','RVISN','변경','DEL','삭제','EXEL','엑셀','PRNT','출력','ETC','기타') PRGM_TYPE ,PRGM_NM ,DECODE(A.PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', 'Y', 'CREAT', CREAT_ABABLE_YN, 'DEL' , DEL_AUTH, 'RVISN', RVISN_AUTH, 'SRCH' , SRCH_AUTH, 'EXEL' , EXEL_ABABLE_YN, 'PRNT' , PRNT_ABABLE_YN, 'ETC' , 'Y', NULL) ALLOW ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', CREAT_ABABLE_YN,'CREAT', CREAT_ABABLE_YN, NULL) CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', DEL_AUTH,'DEL', DEL_AUTH, NULL) DEL_AUTH ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', RVISN_AUTH,'RVISN', RVISN_AUTH, NULL) RVISN_AUTH ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', SRCH_AUTH,'SRCH', SRCH_AUTH, NULL) SRCH_AUTH ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', EXEL_ABABLE_YN,'EXEL', EXEL_ABABLE_YN, NULL) EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,DECODE(PRGM_TYPE,'MAIN', PRNT_ABABLE_YN,'PRNT', PRNT_ABABLE_YN, NULL) PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,PRGM_URL_MAIN ,PRGM_URL FROM ( with CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN as ( SELECT A.*, B.PRGM_ID PRGM_ID_MAIN, B.PRGM_TYPE PRGM_TYPE_MAIN, B.PRGM_URL PRGM_URL_MAIN FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A ,( select * from ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY MENU_ID order by prgm_id ) row_index FROM CMN_PRGM_MST A WHERE a.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) B where row_index = 1 ) b WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND B.PRGM_TYPE = 'MAIN' ) , PRGM_URL_PARAM AS ( SELECT #{searchUsrId } USR_ID FROM DUAL ) SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT A.USR_ID ,'사용자권한' AUTH_TYPE ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,B_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,B_MAIN.DEL_AUTH ,B_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH ,B_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH ,B_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,B_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,D.PRGM_NM ,D.PRGM_URL ,D.PRGM_URL_MAIN ,'' GRP_ID ,'' AUTH_ID ,D.PRGM_TYPE ,D.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_USR_MENU_ASGN_MST B_MAIN ,CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN D ,CMN_MENU_MST M ,PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND A.USR_ID = B_MAIN.USR_ID AND B_MAIN.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID AND M.MENU_ID = D.MENU_ID UNION SELECT A.USR_ID ,'그룹권한' AUTH_TYPE ,M.MENU_ID ,M.MENU_NM ,D_MAIN.CREAT_ABABLE_YN ,D_MAIN.DEL_AUTH ,D_MAIN.RVISN_AUTH ,D_MAIN.SRCH_AUTH ,D_MAIN.EXEL_ABABLE_YN ,D_MAIN.PRNT_ABABLE_YN ,F.PRGM_NM ,F.PRGM_URL ,F.PRGM_URL_MAIN ,B.GRP_ID ,C.AUTH_ID ,F.PRGM_TYPE ,F.PRGM_TYPE_MAIN FROM CMN_USR_MST A ,CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST B ,CMN_GRP_AUTH_ASGN_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D ,CMN_AUTH_MENU_ASGN_MST D_MAIN ,CMN_PRGM_MST_WITH_MAIN F ,CMN_MENU_MST M ,PRGM_URL_PARAM WHERE 1 =1 AND A.USR_ID = PRGM_URL_PARAM.USR_ID AND A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID AND B.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID AND D.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND C.AUTH_ID = D_MAIN.AUTH_ID AND D_MAIN.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID AND M.MENU_ID = F.MENU_ID ) A WHERE 1=1 ) A ,CMN_MENU_MST_HGHR B ,CMN_USR_GRP_MST C ,CMN_AUTH_MST D WHERE 1 =1 AND A.MENU_ID(+) = B.MENU_ID AND A.GRP_ID = C.GRP_ID(+) AND A.AUTH_ID = D.AUTH_ID(+) ORDER BY B.ROW_INDEX , A.MENU_NM

SELECT /* userInfoMgmtList */ CUM.USR_ID /* 사용자 ID */ , CUM.USR_ID AS USR_ID_MSK /* 사용자 ID */ , CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD /* 소속 구분 코드 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0003' AND CD_VAL = CUM.ATTC_SCTN_CD) as ATTC_SCTN_CD_NM , CUM.USR_NM /* 사용자 명 */ , CUM.PASS /* 비밀번호 */ , CUM.TEL_NUM /* 전화 번호 */ , CUM.MBLPHN_NUM /* 핸드폰 번호 */ , CUM.LAST_LOGIN_DT /* 최종 로그인 일시 */ , CUM.PASS_ERR_NUM /* 암호 오류 횟수 */ , CUM.PRES_BIZ /* 사번 */ , CUM.EMAIL /* 이메일 */ , CUM.POS /* 직위 */ , CUM.ODTY /* 직책 */ , CUM.ADDR /* 주소 */ , CUM.DTL_ADDR /* 상세 주소 */ , CUM.ZIPCD /* 우편 번호 */ , CUM.FAX /* FAX 번호 */ , CUM.PASS_ATMT_NUM /* 비밀번호 시도 횟수 */ , CUM.DEL_YN /* 삭제 여부 */ , CUM.REGST_ID /* 등록자 ID */ , TO_CHAR(CUM.REGST_DTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss') as REGST_DTTM /* 등록 일시 */ , CUM.RVISN_ID /* 수정자 ID */ , FN_GET_USRNM(CUM.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_NM /* 수정자 */ , CUM.RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , CUM.DEPT /* 부서코드 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0006' AND CD_VAL = CUM.DEPT) as DEPT_NM , CUM.IP_INFO /* IP정보 */ , CUM.MAC_ADDR /* MAC주소 */ , CUM.USG_YN /* 사용여부 */ , CUM.USG_STRT_DT /* 사용시작일자 */ , CUM.USG_END_DT /* 사용종료일자 */ , CUM.PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT /* 최종비밀번호변경일시 */ , CUM.MNGR_RULE /* 관리자롤 */ , CUM.MSK_AUTH_YN /* 마스킹권한여부 */ , ORGN_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(CUM.ORGN_ID) as ORGN_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST CUM WHERE 1=1 AND USG_YN <> 'N' AND (DEL_YN IS NULL OR DEL_YN = 'N')
AND USR_ID LIKE UPPER(#{USR_ID}||'%')
AND USR_NM LIKE '%'|| #{USR_NM}||'%'
ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC

SELECT A.*, NVL(LAG(MENU_LVL ) OVER( ORDER BY ROW_INDEX ),-1) MENU_LVL_PREV FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM ROW_INDEX , A.MENU_ID ID , A.MENU_ID MENU_ID , A.MENU_LVL || '' MENU_LVL , A.MENU_NM , A.MENU_DSC , A.HGHR_MENU_ID , A.ALGN_SEQ , A.USG_YN , A.LMT_ORGN_LVL_CD , A.DUTY_NM , A.DEL_YN , A.DUTY_ID , A.IBSHEET_YN , B.PRGM_ID , B.PRGM_NM , B.PRGM_DESC , B.PRGM_URL URL , B.PRGM_TYPE , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMN_MENU_MST WHERE HGHR_MENU_ID = A.MENU_ID) > 0 THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END XMLKIDS_BO FROM CMN_MENU_MST A, CMN_PRGM_MST B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID(+) AND ( A.DEL_YN IS NULL OR A.DEL_YN = 'N') AND B.PRGM_TYPE(+) = 'MAIN' ) A WHERE 1=1 START WITH HGHR_MENU_ID = '0' CONNECT BY PRIOR MENU_ID = HGHR_MENU_ID ORDER BY MENU_LVL

SELECT A.SEQ_NUM , A.GRP_ID , B.GRP_NM , B.GRP_DSC , A.USR_ID , FN_GET_USRNM(A.USR_ID) AS USR_NM , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM , DECODE(A.OPER_TPYE, 'I', '등록', 'D','삭제', '알수없음') AS OPER_TPYE FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_HST A, CMN_USR_GRP_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID
AND A.USR_ID LIKE UPPER(#{searchUsrId}||'%')
AND A.REGST_DTTM >= TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND A.REGST_DTTM < TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') + 1
ORDER BY A.REGST_DTTM DESC
